visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene begins in a brightly lit supermarket aisle, specifically a refrigerated section with shelves full of packaged food. A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white long-sleeved top and a black skirt, stands in the foreground. She holds a clear plastic bag containing several roasted chicken legs with a red and black 'Kirkland Signature' label. She smiles and gestures towards the package with her right hand while looking directly at the camera. (2) The camera moves closer to the chicken package as another person's hand enters the frame from the left, pointing and tapping on the bag to emphasize the contents. The lighting is crisp and even, highlighting the glistening texture of the roasted skin through the plastic. The woman continues to talk, her facial expressions animated with enthusiasm, frequently shifting the bag's position. (3) The setting transitions to a warm, indoor living room environment. Two women are seated behind a white table. The woman from the previous scene is on the left, now accompanied by a friend on the right wearing a blue denim top, a white t-shirt, and a light blue bucket hat. They both wear disposable plastic gloves. On the table are two black plates, each holding large roasted chicken legs. The woman on the right holds a chicken leg on a red plate, presenting it to the camera while the woman on the left begins to take a large bite of her chicken leg. (4) The two women continue their review, pulling apart the meat to show its tenderness and the accumulation of natural juices (chicken oil) at the bottom of the plate. The woman in the hat gestures with a thumbs up and points at the food, her eyes wide with a positive reaction. They hold up a chicken leg next to their hands to compare the size. The background shows domestic furniture, including a couch and some toys, creating a casual home atmosphere.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 小家庭必買 4入新. [Subtitle]: 烤雞大腿4入正式來了. (2) [Subtitle]: 出現了 不用200元 一大袋的雞腿. (3) [Subtitle]: 你看他一個雞腿 其實是 像一個掌那麼大喔. (4) [Variety]: 它好香!. (5) [Subtitle]: 而且我發現 6入8入都不見 我們現在現場只剩下4入 4入198元. (6) [Subtitle]: 我覺得很棒 因為 你看它滿滿的雞油 你可以直接配白飯沾著吃. (7) [Variety]: 兩個人剛剛好!. (8) [Subtitle]: 對 所以一個人你很厲害 是可以吃完的 兩個人剛剛好. (9) [Subtitle]: 我覺得太適合小家庭了 拿回家帶便當都很棒. (10) [Subtitle]: 沒錯 大家可以趕快來買. (11) [Subtitle]: 多久沒有吃 好市多的烤雞腿. (12) [Subtitle]: 它真的很棒 尤其現在小份量 你再也不用擔心放到壞掉 你隔天帶便當也很方便. (13) [Variety]: 它的肉質非常的嫩. (14) [Variety]: 雞油給得滿滿. (15) [Subtitle]: 煙燻味整個烤進去 雞油給得滿滿 你拌飯或者是蔬菜 也都很棒. (16) [Variety]: 這個超值得買. (17) [Subtitle]: 這個呢 超值得買. (18) [Variety]: 每一個都跟手掌一樣大. (19) [Subtitle]: 而且每一個都跟手掌一樣大. (20) [Subtitle]: 那麼便宜一隻才50元 雖然包裝小了 價格高了一點點. (21) [Variety]: 太值. [Subtitle]: 以不會壞掉的前提 太值得買了. (22) [Subtitle]: 你那白吐司一夾一隻才50元 比外面總匯便宜料又多.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 female main creators, 1 male passerby in the background of the supermarket, 1 child visible briefly behind the shelf, and 1 extra hand appearing to touch the bag.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The first woman has long black hair, wearing a white V-neck long-sleeve knit top and a black midi skirt. The second woman has shorter hair under a blue bucket hat, wearing a blue denim overall dress over a white floral top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The supermarket background features stainless steel refrigerated shelves, glass doors, and various pre-packaged deli items. The home background shows a neutral-toned living room with a beige sofa, a coffee table, and soft indoor decor.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with high-energy, upbeat electronic background music featuring a synthesized rhythmic beat. A female narrator speaks in a bright, fast-paced, and highly expressive tone, introducing the product. The acoustic environment is clean with minimal room tone. (2) At 0:03, a sharp percussive 'slap' sound occurs as a hand touches the packaging, synchronized with the narration. The vocal intensity remains high and enthusiastic. (3) A 'Ding' bell sound effect triggers at 0:08, punctuating the mention of the product's quality. The music continues uninterrupted, providing a consistent tempo and joyful mood. (4) At 0:13, a playful 'Pop' bubble sound effect marks a new phase as the speaker mentions the price. The narrator's pitch rises slightly to emphasize the value. (5) A camera shutter 'Click' sound effect is heard at 0:16, used as a stylistic transition while the speaker highlights the chicken oil. (6) Another 'Ding' sound occurs at 0:22 during a point of emphasis regarding the serving size. The vocal clarity is excellent, with high speech density. (7) A 'Whoosh' transition sound at 0:29 marks the shift from the supermarket to the home setting. A second female voice enters, matching the first narrator's excited energy and high pitch level. (8) At 0:41, a resonant 'Ding' sound emphasizes the tenderness of the meat. The BGM remains at a moderate level beneath the dominant vocals. (9) A 'Sparkle' or magic sound effect rings out at 0:46 as the women compare the chicken to their hands. The speech rate remains brisk. (10) A final 'Whoosh' sound effect at 0:54 accompanies the closing remarks and final verdict, leading to the end of the clip with the music fading out slightly.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Product Discovery -> Feature Breakdown -> Tasting/Review -> Recommendation.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote and review a new 4-pack of roasted chicken legs from Costco (Kirkland Signature). It highlights the affordability, large size, and flavor to encourage viewers to purchase the product for small families or meal prep.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creators explicitly identify the store (Costco/好市多) and brand (Kirkland), provide the specific price, and offer a strong positive recommendation to buy.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly engaging short-form social media video using variety-show editing techniques to drive consumer interest in a specific grocery item.
